How Are Adopt Me Pet Values Calculated?

Our Adopt Me trading values are calculated from real trade data submitted by thousands of community traders. We analyze trade frequency, demand ratios, and market trends to assign each pet a fair value. Values are updated daily to reflect the latest Roblox Adopt Me trading market in 2026. Every potion variant — No Potion, Fly, Ride, and Fly Ride — has its own separate value.

What Are the Most Valuable Pets in Adopt Me?

The most valuable pets in Adopt Me 2026 include the Blue Dog, Pink Cat, Shadow Dragon, Frost Dragon, Bat Dragon, and Giraffe. Limited pets from retired eggs (Safari Egg, Jungle Egg, Farm Egg) tend to have the highest values. Click any pet above to see its full trading value, Neon price, and Mega Neon price.

What's the Difference Between Neon and Mega Neon Values?

A Neon pet is made by combining 4 fully-grown versions of the same pet at the Neon Cave — it glows in one color. A Mega Neon requires 4 full-grown Neon pets and cycles through rainbow colors. Mega Neons are significantly rarer and more valuable. On our value list, every pet shows its Normal, Neon, and Mega Neon trading values separately.

Adopt Me Trading Market Overview — 2026

The Adopt Me trading market in 2026 continues to be one of the most active economies in Roblox. With over 30 billion lifetime visits, Adopt Me by Uplift Games remains one of the platform's most popular experiences. The introduction of new limited-edition pets through seasonal events, combined with the retirement of older egg pets, creates a dynamic supply-and-demand cycle that drives trading values up and down every week.

Our value list is designed to help you navigate this complex market with confidence. Each pet's value is calculated from thousands of real trade data points — not guesswork. We analyze trade acceptance rates, offer-to-demand ratios, and community polling to arrive at fair market values. Whether you're a casual player looking to make your first trade or an experienced trader hunting for profit, our daily-updated values give you the information you need.

Values in Adopt Me are influenced by several factors: rarity (Legendary pets command the highest prices), availability (retired egg pets become more valuable over time as fewer copies circulate), demand (popular pets like the Frost Dragon and Shadow Dragon have consistently high demand), and potion status (No Potion pets are often worth more than their Fly Ride counterparts due to collector appeal). Understanding these factors is key to making smart trades.

Smart Trading Tips for 2026

  • •Start by learning the value of what you own. Before entering any trade, look up every pet in your inventory on our value list. Knowing your own pet's worth is the first step to avoiding bad deals.
  • •Trade up gradually. Don't try to go from a Common pet to a Legendary in a single trade — it rarely works. Instead, bundle lower-value pets together to trade for something slightly better, and repeat. This "staircase" strategy is how most successful traders build their inventory.
  • •Watch for trends. When a new egg launches, the pets inside start high and often drop as more hatch. Conversely, when an egg retires, its pets slowly climb in value. Use our Market Analytics page to spot these trends before others do.
  • •Always double-check the trade window. Scammers may swap pets at the last second or use look-alike pets. Take your time, verify each pet's age and potion status, and never accept a "trust trade" — always use the official Roblox trade window.
